visits.note: Patient P047 presents with Type 2 Diabetes, Hypertension, and Hyperlipidemia. Patient reports experiencing fatigue, polyuria, and polydipsia. HbA1c is 8.1, BP is 150/95, and LDL is 140. Patient's eGFR is 80. Medications include Metformin 500mg, Lisinopril 10mg, and Atorvastatin 20mg.

Patient P047 returns with worsening symptoms. Patient reports increased fatigue, weight gain, and edema. HbA1c is 9.2, BP is 160/100, and LDL is 170. Patient's eGFR has dropped to 60. Medications have been adjusted to Metformin 1000mg, Lisinopril 20mg, and Atorvastatin 40mg. New diagnoses include Mild Chronic Kidney Disease.

Patient P047 returns with worsening kidney function. Patient reports shortness of breath, decreased urine output, and swelling in legs. HbA1c is 8.5, BP is 140/90, and LDL is 120. Patient's eGFR has dropped to 40. Medications have been adjusted to Metformin 1500mg, Lisinopril 30mg, and Atorvastatin 60mg.
